mapper.select: SELECT * FROM behavior_evaluation_effects WHERE behavior_type_id = #{behaviorTypeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY priority DESC, id

SELECT bee.* FROM behavior_evaluation_effects bee INNER JOIN behavior_types bt ON bee.behavior_type_id = bt.id WHERE bt.behavior_code = #{behaviorTypeCode} AND bee.deleted = 0 AND bt.deleted = 0 ORDER BY bee.priority DESC, bee.id

SELECT bee.id, bee.behavior_type_id AS behaviorTypeId, bee.evaluation_dimension AS evaluationDimension, bee.score_type AS scoreType, bee.base_score AS baseScore, bee.max_score AS maxScore, bee.min_score AS minScore, bee.increment_score AS incrementScore, bee.trigger_condition AS triggerCondition, bee.level_score_mapping AS levelScoreMapping, bee.priority, bee.effective_semesters AS effectiveSemesters, bee.status, bt.behavior_code AS behaviorCode, bt.behavior_name AS behaviorName, bt.behavior_category AS behaviorCategory, bt.behavior_nature AS behaviorNature FROM behavior_evaluation_effects bee INNER JOIN behavior_types bt ON bee.behavior_type_id = bt.id WHERE bee.behavior_type_id = #{behaviorTypeId} AND bee.deleted = 0 AND bt.deleted = 0 ORDER BY bee.priority DESC, bee.id

SELECT bee.* FROM behavior_evaluation_effects bee INNER JOIN behavior_types bt ON bee.behavior_type_id = bt.id WHERE bee.evaluation_dimension = #{dimension} AND bee.deleted = 0 AND bee.status = 1 AND bt.deleted = 0 AND bt.status = 1 ORDER BY bee.priority DESC, bee.id
